name: Taylor Motors Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; for-hire; Authorized For Passenger, Private Passenger Business, U.S. Mail / Government services
entity_status: active (Kentucky); SAM.gov indicates state-of-incorporation Kentucky; some open-data sources show prior 'Expired' admin status historically
registry_source: Kentucky Secretary of State (Charles F. Taylor as officer); SAM.gov entity record 007008295; BBB profile
notes: Legal entity is Kentucky-domiciled; DBA Jefferson Tours and Charters. Input address (6830 Upton Ave, Fort Benning GA) is a regional terminal/depot. FMCSA snapshot confirms 188 power units fleet-wide. Rating date 05/19/2025. Family-owned (Taylor family); fleet of >200 vehicles including motorcoaches, shuttles, and school buses across the southeastern U.S.

name: Riteway Bus Svc Inc
entity_status: active (Wisconsin); operates as GO Riteway Transportation Group
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI (entity exists; portal returned 0 records on broad search but BBB and Wikipedia confirm WI incorporation 1957); BBB Oak Creek profile
notes: DBA GO Riteway Transportation Group (rebranded July 2011). Founded 1957 by Rollie and Pearl Bast, started with four school buses for Germantown WI School District. Now third generation family-owned with ~1,300 vehicles and 1,600 employees across 25+ Midwest locations. Acquired Cardinal Buses (Middlebury, IN) in 2019 -- the input address '202 E Winslow St, Middlebury, IN 46540' corresponds to the Cardinal Buses terminal now operating under the Riteway umbrella. Cardinal Buses retains its own legacy USDOT 291703. Rating date 12/20/2023.

name: Lakeland Bus Svc Inc

notes: No confident match found for 'Lakeland Bus Svc Inc' at 218 Church St, Barrett, MN 56311. Input state 'WI' conflicts with HQ/address in Barrett, MN -- likely a data-entry inconsistency. The current Barrett, MN school transportation contractor for West Central Area Schools (ISD 2342) is PALMER BUS SERVICE INC (since 2001, at 302 Hawkins Ave, Barrett, MN 56311). Possible interpretations: (a) Lakeland Bus Svc Inc is a small, intrastate-only Minnesota operator not separately listed in FMCSA SAFER, (b) it is a defunct or renamed predecessor to Palmer Bus's Barrett operation, or (c) the record is an alias/misattribution. Nearest SAFER matches by name are LAKELAND AREA BUS SERVICE INC (USDOT 840155, Woodruff WI -- 53 power units, 50 drivers, intrastate WI, active) and LAKELAND BUS LINES INC (USDOT 24249, Dover NJ -- motorcoach line) -- neither matches the Barrett MN address.
